items.title: AMD FSR 4 technology support discovered in The Outlast Trials
items.summary: A Reddit user reported finding support for AMD FSR 4 scaling technology in the co-op horror game The Outlast Trials. In...
items.content:
Login without a password Sign In Forgot your password? Forgot your username? News GAMES AMD FSR 4 technology support discovered in The Outlast Trials Maxim Boldson GAMES 13 2026 June Views: 1199 A Reddit user reported finding support for AMD FSR 4 scaling technology in the co-op horror game The Outlast Trials. In the r/radeon subreddit, they posted a screenshot of the game's graphics settings, showing AMD FSR 4 selected under image scaling with a 1.5X quality preset. The author emphasized that this game is not officially compatible with the new version of AMD's technology, and that support had not previously been mentioned anywhere.

Judging by the screenshot, the game is running using the DirectX 12 graphics API with maximum "epic" settings for geometry, shadows, textures, effects, and volumetric lighting. Ray tracing is also enabled in the settings. The game menu states that enabling any upscaler forces the anti-aliasing method to TAA mode and disables manual screen scaling. FSR 4 technology renders frames at a reduced resolution and then restores quality, reducing the load on the graphics card and increasing the frame rate.

The technology's appearance in The Outlast Trials is notable given the recent release of FSR 4.1, which uses machine learning algorithms to improve temporal stability and image quality. The technology was originally developed for the latest RDNA 4 architecture but is gradually becoming available to users of previous-generation graphics cards. The lack of official announcements from the development studio may indicate a benchmark implementation of the feature or a quiet update to the game client without publishing the corresponding patch notes.

items.title: I'm salivating over Saw: Genesis' bloody blend of Dead by Daylight, The Outlast Trials, and nu-metal music video death scenes
items.summary: I need to play this game immediately
items.content:
Summer Preview | Saw: Genesis seems prepared to withstand the asymmetrical horror game blight

When you purchase through links on our site, we may earn an affiliate commission. Here’s how it works .

(Image credit: Broken Mirror Games, Bloober Team) Copy link Facebook X Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Some people become experts in wine – instead, I tip my top hat and consider myself a connoisseur of asymmetrical multiplayer horror games. As an expert, I must warn you the fields that allow genre superstar Dead by Daylight and more recent breakthrough The Outlast Trials to flourish are brittle and unloving – competitors The Texas Chain Saw Massacre , Friday the 13th: The Game , and Evil Dead: The Game were all discontinued or removed from sale in just 2025. But publisher Bloober Team knows this, and it seems to have prepared its upcoming Saw: Genesis multiplayer for a difficult winter.

"[Most of the games] you mentioned are dead, so, I think there's space," jokes representatives from co-developer Anshar Studios when I ask them at Summer Game Fest 2026 if they're nervous to enter a genre where ambitious new titles seem destined to be gobbled by Dead by Daylight the way Saturn gargles his son. They continue honestly: "We know this is the genre that kind of wasted big studios as well. But it's also a different approach we have. [...] We have this experimental attitude."

Our Summer Preview 2026 special is here to spotlight the biggest games of the year with hands-on impressions, dev access, and more!

To this point, Saw: Genesis currently has a waitlist for its closed alpha playtest, which already has a "huge amount of subscribers" a Bloober representative won't elaborate on when I poke him about it. But he says it's an overwhelming number, and Anshar plus Broken Mirror – Bloober's new splinter studio dedicated to psychological and survival horror games – seem to be proud of it. When they demonstrate hands-off gameplay, I decide they have plenty of reasons to be.

Since the Saw: Genesis footage I'm shown is so early, my main conclusion is that this is a smart game. It borrows aspects of Dead by Daylight and The Outlast Trials to its own advantage.

Of course, there are also plenty of clear parallels to the 10 Saw movies I know better than my own heart. I realize this while gleefully kicking my Mary Janes – some traps' death scenes seem to induce the disorienting, distinctly 2000s music video fast cuts the Saw franchise is infamous for.

Unlike the movies, Saw: Genesis forgoes the straightforward explanation that Jigsaw, who's really the sadistic brain cancer patient John Kramer, does things like kidnapping suicidal people and greasing them up with lighter fluid while making them hold a lit match in a room dusted in broken glass because there's something wrong with him.

Instead, Saw: Genesis makes a historical analysis of misguided evil and brings us to World War 1. There, Jigsaw's forefather the Judge is habitually forcing three Accused into seemingly unconquerable situations involving clamps, barbed wire, and even the infamous reverse bear trap from the movies, which separates your jaw from the rest of your body like you're an easy-to-peel orange.

Weekly digests, tales from the communities you love, and more

Bloober compares Saw: Genesis' premise and gameplay to something like Saw 2, the 2005 movie where a group of idiots are meant to work together to survive the nerve gas Jigsaw is pumping into their blood. But I also see clever call backs to The Outlast Trials. That game, one of the only asymmetrical horror games to withstand Dead by Daylight, is based on the premise that an evil corporation is conducting debauched Cold War experiments on unwitting, unwilling volunteers.

Developer: Broken Mirror Games, Anshar Studios Platform(s): PC Release date: Fall 2026

The similarly, delightfully ahistorical Saw: Genesis borrows The Outlast Trials' vintage touches, and its roster of Accused characters are carefully designed with gothic horror in mind – the "songbird" character wears a glittering dropwaist dress with a 1920s flapper's fluffy feather in her hair, while an apparent young veteran's face is uneven with long, white scars – horrible cat whiskers. They pucker and stretch as he screams.

items.title: New Update | Prime Time Limited-Time Event, 2 New MK-Challenges & more
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, Prime Time has begun in The Outlast Trials ! Murkoff’s newest therapy pushes Reagents into a relentless psychological assault where propaganda, fanaticism, and chaos collide. Face the new Prime Roulette variator featurin
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

Prime Time has begun in The Outlast Trials! Murkoff’s newest therapy pushes Reagents into a relentless psychological assault where propaganda, fanaticism, and chaos collide. Face the new Prime Roulette variator featuring multiple Prime Assets in a single Trial, destroy Murkoff’s defective televisions for bonus rewards, survive two new MK-Challenges, and unlock the exclusive Limited-Time Catalog.

This update includes

  • New Limited-Time Event: PRIME TIME

    [/*]

  • New Limited-Time Catalog: PRIME TIME

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: WIN THE TRUTH

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: INCINERATE THE RELIC

    [/*]

  • New Routine Therapies: CLASSIFIED & MIRROR

    [/*]

  • Various bug fixes and improvements.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: PRIME TIME

Prime Time Therapy prepares Reagents for a future dominated by contradictory cults of personality and clashing fundamentalist ideals. Participants can expect their psyche to face brutal and fundamental assault from both ends.

Variators:

  • PRIME ROULETTE - Multiple Prime Assets present in the Trial at the same time. Once a Prime Asset retires, a different one will come in - sustaining relentless pressure and escalating unpredictability throughout the session!

    [/*]

  • BREAK THE TELEVISION - Stop Murkoff’s propaganda and break all defective televisions for additional rewards.

    [/*]

  • EXTRA PRIME ASSET TRAPS - Extra Prime Asset traps in the Trial.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Catalog: PRIME TIME

  • A brand new Catalog is available for the duration of the Prime Time Limited-Time Event.

    [/*]

  • Players can spend their acquired Event Tokens in the Catalog to unlock exclusive rewards.

    [/*]

  • Once the Prime Time Event concludes on June 16 at 10am ET, the Catalog will be removed and any unused Event Tokens will be forfeited. Be sure to spend your Prime Time Tokens before the end of the event.

    [/*]

New MK-Challenge: WIN THE TRUTH

You are the blind observer, who consumes screen-fed ignorance and swells with the genius of idiot artifice. Regurgitate the knowledge that brings suffering to the wise, win the game which only punishes the defeated, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: INCINERATE THE RELIC

You are the heretic and you are the zealot. Relics are the proof of an impossible gospel, the belief that makes whole the deservedly slaughtered lamb. Pay your way into heaven, incinerate the relic, and we will let you out.

New Routine Therapies

These new routine therapies will come after the Prime Time Event ends.

  • CLASSIFIED - Multiple secret variators have been added to your therapy. Adapt or die.

    • Taking place June 16th to June 30th

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • MIRROR - The trial perspective is altered to mislead the reagents.

    • Taking place June 30th to July 14th

      [/*]
    [/*]

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • The previously removed “Rare” cosmetic tier has been reintroduced under a new designation: Enhanced.

    [/*]

  • Variator “Classified”: Tutorials for randomly selected variators are no longer displayed at the start of a Trial.

    [/*]

  • Escape the Lies: Fixed an issue where the “Mandatory Secondary Objective” variator did not function as intended during this Trial.

    [/*]

  • Escape the Lies has been removed from Escalation since there is no Shuttle sequence to choose your loadout.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where bandages could be reused when cancelling its animation.

    [/*]

Invasion

  • Ex-Pops no longer react to imposters, unless directly obstructed.

    [/*]

  • Imposters are now invulnerable to other projectiles for a longer period of time after being hit by a projectile. Additional hits during this window trigger reduced reactions.

    [/*]

  • Imposter scoring penalty caused by projectiles is not affected while in the invulnerability period anymore.

    [/*]

  • Imposter deployment is no longer tied to the number of Reagents alive in the Trial. It’s still affected by the total amount of Reagents in the game (1-2 reagents = 1 imposter, 3-4 reagents = 2 imposters).

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where a Reagent could still be executed if the Impostor was interrupted by another Reagent bashing through a door.

    [/*]

If you encounter any issues in-game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a ticket to speak with our support team directly!

Catch you in the Sleep Room and enjoy the Therapy, Reagents!

- The RB Team

items.summary: Greetings Reagents, It's time to adjust your Murkoff Television sets for the feature presentation: Project Judas . This Season, you will get to feast your eyes on the Kress Twins attempt at political takeover! Otto and Arora have prepared q
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

It's time to adjust your Murkoff Television sets for the feature presentation: Project Judas. This Season, you will get to feast your eyes on the Kress Twins attempt at political takeover! Otto and Arora have prepared quite the show for you all in their new Trial Environment the Television Studio. Enjoy new MK-Challenges, survive the Scavenger Limited-Time Event, test out Noakes' hard work on the X-Ray and Barricade Rig reworks, and climb the Invasion Leaderboard and more...

This update includes

  • Season 6: PROJECT JUDAS

    [/*]

  • New Trial: SILENCE THE IDOL

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: SOLVE THE MURDER

    [/*]

  • New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT JUDAS

    [/*]

  • New Limited-Time Event: SCAVENGER

    [/*]

  • X-Ray & Barricade Rig Rework

    [/*]

  • New Invasion Season Begins

    [/*]

  • Introducing Invasion Leaderboards

    [/*]

  • New Blackmarket Outfits

    [/*]

  • Twitch Drop Event

    [/*]

  • Other Additions, Improvements and Fixes

    [/*]

Season 6: PROJECT JUDAS

Project Judas sees the return of Otto & Arora Kress in a new Trial Environment, the Television Studio. The Kress Twins have meticulously groomed Bob Vanier, celebrity talking head and idol to the masses, to be their upcoming political candidate. Molded to their best interests, Vanier is about to announce his political run live on the air, unless Reagents are able to seat Murkoff’s own candidate instead.

New Trial: SILENCE THE IDOL

You are the electric eye, the ravenous panopticon that births and consumes with the same razor-toothed orifice. Tear, burn, and crush the face of false charisma, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: SOLVE THE MURDER

You are the fetishist, whose obsession with the totems of violence allows you to define more convenient truths. Find the evidence to condemn our chosen killer, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: \

There appears to be an issue with the Sleep Room Terminal. Reagents are asked to ignore any unconventional programs that may populate their screens. Disregard any mention of \. Therapy is the only way to real freedom.

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT JUDAS

The new Deluxe Catalog Project Judas is now available.

  • This Catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items for your own self expression.

    [/*]

  • Unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins, earned by completing the Onboarding Catalog, other Deluxe Catalogs, or they can be purchased in the Murkoff In-Game Store.

    [/*]

  • Acquire Stamps by completing Trials and Tasks, then use the Stamps to obtain the Deluxe Catalog items.

    [/*]

  • As a reminder, the Deluxe Catalogs are available permanently. Unlock items at your own pace.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: SCAVENGER

Prepare for the \ collapse. Enter the Trials with nothing and salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from Reagent corpses. Collect discarded mechanical components and return them to drop boxes to be used for the \ of \.

Program Scavenger Variators:

  • Salvage Rigs: Salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from deceased subjects throughout the Trial.

    [/*]

  • Broken Reagent: Reagents have no starting Rigs, no Prescription, no Amps, reduced Night Vision battery, and start injured.

    [/*]

  • Deliver the Components: Reagents are required to locate and deliver mechanical components to a salvage box.

    [/*]

Event Schedule:

  • Part 1 will take place from March 24, 2026 @ 10am ET - April 7, 2026 @ 9:59am ET

    [/*]

  • Part 2 will take place from April 7, 2026 @ 10am ET - April 21, 2026 @9:59am ET

    [/*]

X-Ray and Barricade Rigs Rework

Noakes has been busy collecting feedback on its creation, and has greatly improved both the X-Ray and Barricade Rigs.

X-RAY RIG

Developer Comment: X-Ray previously felt too passive, offering limited control due to its fixed duration. With this rework, we want Reagents to play a more active role in gathering and sharing intelligence.

X-Ray is now a toggle ability, allowing players to use it on demand. The ping system has been expanded, enabling multiple targets to be marked through walls, making it a powerful tool for team coordination.

Additionally, X-Ray now introduces a more tangible gameplay impact by temporarily disabling nearby traps, reinforcing its role as both a reconnaissance and support tool.

New Description: Tactical enhancement that allows vision through solid surfaces, revealing points of interest. Can be toggled on or off on demand.

Changes:

  • X-Ray is now a toggle ability (On/Off).

    [/*]

  • Charge depletes while active and replenishes slowly while inactive.

    [/*]

  • Cooldown/energy system functions similarly to Night Vision.

    [/*]

  • New upgrade PING THROUGH: “Ping enemies and objects through walls while X-Ray is active. Multiple pings can be active at once.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade ELECTROMAGNETIC FIELD: “Generates an electromagnetic field while X-Ray is active, preventing trap activation.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade FASTER RECHARGE: “Decreases X-Ray recovery time.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade INCREASED CAPACITY: “Increase X-Ray total capacity.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrades RESOURCES INTEL and CLASSIFIED INTEL have been merged and the upgrade is now called RECON: “X-Ray highlights nearby objectives, consumables, and high-priority items.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade SHARED INTEL has been removed.

    [/*]

BARRICADE RIG

Developer Comment: Barricade was previously too situational and difficult to use effectively due to its limitations. This rework introduces a charge-based system, allowing Reagents to carry multiple Barricades (2 by default, 3 when upgraded) and deploy them strategically to control space.

Barricades are now instantly refunded when removed by the player or a teammate, and their durability has been increased. They also damage enemies when broken, making them more impactful even when destroyed.

We’ve expanded deployment opportunities across Trials (including additional placements, rolling gates, windows, etc.), and added visual markers to guide players toward valid placement spots. This allows Reagents to quickly assess an area and make tactical decisions.

Finally, the cooldown now begins only after all Barricades are deployed, preserving the value of the Rig Rechargers while encouraging more active use of the ability.

New Description: Place barricades to block openings and delay pursuers. Carry 2 barricades. Removal instantly refunds them.

Changes:

  • Players now carry multiple Barricades (2 by default, 3 when upgraded).

    [/*]

  • Multiple barricades can be deployed at once (oldest breaks when placing a new one beyond the limit).

    [/*]

  • Barricades are instantly refunded if destroyed or removed by the player or a teammate.

    [/*]

  • Rig Cooldown starts only after all Barricades are placed.

    [/*]

  • Removing a Barricade during cooldown immediately stops the cooldown and refunds it.

    [/*]

  • Inventory UI updated to support multiple Barricades counter.

    [/*]

  • New HUD markers appear at location of valid Barricade deployment spots.

    [/*]

  • Enemies and Invaders now require more hits to break barricades.

    [/*]

  • Upgrade INCOMING WARNING has been revamped: “Enemy is automatically pinged and damaged upon breaking a barricaded door. Invaders are exhausted.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade FRIENDLY BREACH has been replaced by BREACH & RUSH: “Breaking a barricade grants an adrenaline boost (once every 60 seconds).”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade EXTRA BARRICADE now increases max Barricade carried to 3.

    [/*]

New Invasion Season Begins

The Invasion Rankings seasonal rewards have been refreshed. All players start from the start and must climb their way to Gold I to receive all new rewards.

Introducing Invasion Leaderboards

Show your Invasion skills to the world and climb the Seasonal Leaderboard. Access the new Leaderboard directly via the Invasion menu.

New Blackmarket Outfits

New Outfits have been delivered to the Murkoff Blackmarket In-Game Store! Once again, Reagents who purchase any Murkoff Coins for the first time during Season 6 will obtain the Desert Debris Outfit.

Twitch Drop Event

Reagents will be able to take advantage of an all new Twitch Drops campaign in celebration of the launch of Season 6: Project Judas! Watch The Outlast Trials streams to acquire exclusive Twitch Drop items from March 24th at 10am ET to April 21st at 9:59am ET. All streams of The Outlast Trials are eligible for Drops. Read more about how the Twitch Drops here.

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • Adjusted Scoring, Tasks and Achievements related to Barricade and X-Ray Rigs.

    [/*]

  • Adjusted Terminal Main Screen to show player icons and frames.

    [/*]

  • Added unique ping icon for Big Grunt enemy.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where stamina wouldn’t regenerate when an Imposter was attacked by an enemy while being exhausted.

    [/*]

  • Revisited rarities for cosmetics. They are now based on their source of acquisition. The new rarities are:

    • Standard - Trial Rewards, Therapy Levels, Badges, Standard Catalog.

      [/*]

    • Event - Events Rewards, Event Catalogs, Routine Therapies.

      [/*]

    • Deluxe - Deluxe Catalogs, Store, DLCs.

      [/*]

    • Classified - Genesis, Progression, Rebirth, Twitch Drops, etc.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Trial Maker:

    • Added variator “Nostophobia”.

      [/*]

    • Added variator “Salvage Rigs”.

      [/*]

    • Added variator “Broken Reagent”.

      [/*]

    • Added variator “Collect the Components”.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue with the Tinnitus Filter option not working correctly.

    [/*]

  • Various other bug fixes and improvements implemented.

    [/*]

We want to hear from YOU! If you played The Outlast Trials Season 5: Project Messiah and would like to give us your feedback on it, feel free to fill out our survey here!

A reminder to our Reagents, if you encounter any issues in game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a /ticket to speak with our support team directly.

If you have any feedback to relay to the team about The Outlast Trials please fill out our General Feedback Survey at any time.

See you in the Sleep Room Reagents!

The RB Team

items.title: The Outlast Trials: "Project Judas" details revealed - A new era of terror
items.summary: Explore Project Judas: Face the Kress Twins in the lethal TV Studio. Will you survive or fall to primal fear? Purchase The Outlast Trials now and run!
items.content:
On March 24, 2026, Murkoff Corporation will officially launch a massive experimental program titled "Project Judas." This Season 6 update not only adds fresh content but also redefines how players survive within the dark corridors of Outlast.

Set in an abandoned yet death-filled Television Studio, players will face off against a new duo of antagonists: The Kress Twins (Otto and Arora). This media-centric setting deeply echoes the horrific atmosphere of Outlast: Whistleblower and the intense pursuit sequences in Alan Wake 2 .

Unlike previous seasons, the Scavenger event will completely strip away the player's sense of security:

Red Barrels has implemented strategic changes to force players into more careful calculations:

X-Ray Enhancements (Enhanced Sight): The operational mechanic has shifted to a Toggle (On/Off) mode. When active, energy will deplete continuously. With this new upgrades, allow players not only to see enemies but also to "Tag" their locations for teammates through walls for a short duration and an ability to generate an Electromagnetic Pulse (EMP) helps neutralize electric traps or gas mines within a narrow radius around the player.

Barricade Upgrades (Versatile Guard): Increase the number of carryable planks to a maximum of 3 (after full upgrades). The cooldown mechanic has changed: If you proactively dismantle a barricade before it is destroyed by an enemy, the device will be refunded to your inventory for immediate reuse without waiting for a cooldown.

Project Judas Deluxe Catalog: A massive collection spanning 10 pages featuring a variety of new "traitor-themed" outfits, distorted character customization parts, and over 20 new cell decorations.

Seasonal Rank Reset: All Invasion ranking points will be reset. Players who achieved high ranks in the previous season will receive exclusive Badges and Cell Posters to honor their achievements.

"Project Judas" is more than just an update; it is a bold testament to the continuous evolution of psychological horror. With the debut of the Kress Twins and these heart-pounding survival challenges, there has never been a better time to step into the world of The Outlast Trials . Don't miss the chance to experience the most primal fear. Visit the game's official website for more details. Check out our site to purchase The Outlast Trials today and prepare for a journey with no escape this March 24th!

Having spent years as a 3D artist for games and animation, I’ve learned to see games as more than just polygons—they’re living stories. My real passion is diving deep into the worlds and narratives that make games so captivating. Now, I’m dedicated to sharing those unique insights and stories with fellow gamers through my writing.

items.title: Project Judas: New Kress Twins Map, and More Premiering March 24th
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, The stage is set, and the cameras are rolling, let Anarchy reign. 🎥 The Kress Twins will return in a new Trial environment, the Television Studio, to exert their power on on the masses by installing a celebrity talking
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

The stage is set, and the cameras are rolling, let Anarchy reign. 🎥 The Kress Twins will return in a new Trial environment, the Television Studio, to exert their power on on the masses by installing a celebrity talking head as a political candidate. 📺 Meanwhile, turmoil brews within the Sinyala Facility... will control hold?

The Season 6: Project Judas update will go live March 24, 2026 10:00am ET and it will feature a new MK-Challenge, Scavenger Limited-Time Event, reworks to the X-Ray and Barricade Rigs, a new Invasion Rank Season and Leaderboard, as well as a few mysteries to discover when you enter the Facility...

New Trial Environment: Television Studio

The Kress Twins have spent years meticulously grooming Bob Vanier, a silver-tongued celebrity and idol to the masses, into their ideal political candidate. Molded to serve Murkoff's agenda, Vanier is moments away from announcing his candidacy, live on national television, unless Reagents can seat Murkoff's own candidate first.

New Trial: SILENCE THE IDOL

You are the electric eye, the ravenous panopticon that births and consumes with the same razor-toothed orifice. Tear, burn, and crush the face of false charisma, and we will let you out.

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT JUDAS

The new Deluxe Catalog “Project Judas” will be available. The catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items, unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins other Deluxe Catalogs or purchasable in the Murkoff Store.

New MK-Challenge: SOLVE THE MURDER

You are the fetishist, whose obsession with the totems of violence allows you to define more convenient truths. Find the evidence to condemn our chosen killer, and we will let you out.

Scavenger Limited-Time Event

Prepare for the \ collapse. Enter the Trials with nothing. Salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from Reagent corpses. Collect discarded mechanical components and return them to drop boxes to be used for the \ of \.

Some questions are better left unanswered. For now...

Program Scavenger variators:

  • Salvage Rigs: Salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from deceased subjects throughout the Trial.

    [/*]

  • Broken Reagent: Reagents have no starting Rigs, no Prescription, no Amps, reduced Night Vision battery, and start injured.

    [/*]

  • Deliver the Components: Reagents are required to locate and deliver mechanical components to a salvage box.

    [/*]

Invasion Rank Refresh & Leaderboard Integration

As of March 24th at 10am ET the Invasion Rankings and seasonal rewards will be refreshed. All players will start fresh at the beginning of a Season and must climb their way to Gold 1 to receive all the new rewards.

Reagents will also be able to show off their Invasion skills to the world and climb the seasonal leaderboard. You will be able to access the global Leaderboard via the Invasion menu directly as shown in the above screenshot.

X-RAY and Barricade Rigs Rework

Here are the changes coming to the X-Ray Rig:

  • X-Ray is now a toggle ability (On/Off).

    [/*]

  • Charge depletes while active and replenishes slowly while inactive.

    [/*]

  • Cooldown/energy system functions similarly to Night Vision.

    [/*]

  • New upgrade PING THROUGH: “Ping enemies and objects through walls while X-Ray is active. Multiple pings can be active at once.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade ELECTROMAGNETIC FIELD: “Generates an electromagnetic field while X-Ray is active, preventing trap activation.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade FASTER RECHARGE: “Decreases X-Ray recovery time.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade INCREASED CAPACITY: “Increase X-Ray total capacity.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrades RESOURCES INTEL and CLASSIFIED INTEL have been merged and the upgrade is now called RECON: “X-Ray highlights nearby objectives, consumables, and high-priority items.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade SHARED INTEL has been removed.

    [/*]

Here are the changes coming to the Barricade Rig:

  • Players now carry multiple Barricades (2 by default, 3 when upgraded).

    [/*]

  • Multiple barricades can be deployed at once (oldest breaks when placing a new one beyond the limit).

    [/*]

  • Barricades are instantly refunded if destroyed or removed by the player or a teammate.

    [/*]

  • Rig Cooldown starts only after all Barricades are placed.

    [/*]

  • Removing a Barricade during cooldown immediately stops the cooldown and refunds it.

    [/*]

  • Inventory UI updated to support multiple Barricades counter.

    [/*]

  • New HUD markers appear at location of valid Barricade deployment spots.

    [/*]

  • Enemies and Invaders now require more hits to break barricades.

    [/*]

  • Upgrade INCOMING WARNING has been revamped: “Enemy is automatically pinged and damaged upon breaking a barricaded door. Invaders are exhausted.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade FRIENDLY BREACH has been replaced by BREACH & RUSH: “Breaking a barricade grants an adrenaline boost (once every 60 seconds).”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade EXTRA BARRICADE now increases max Barricade carried to 3.

    [/*]

Twitch Drops Special Event

Check out our FAQ to learn more about how to link your game to Twitch and how you will be able to earn exclusive rewards by watching any content creators play The Outlast Trials on Twitch!

Get The Outlast Trials Game & DLC Packs on Sale now as part of the Steam Spring Sale!

The Outlast Trials Merch Store Drop

A new merch collection for The Outlast Trials is available. 💉 Inspired by Project Messiah, this drop features new designs for those ready to showcase their Therapy level for the world to see!

🛒 Check out the Collection here

We can't wait to see you in the Sleep Room to celebrate the launch of Project Judas!

The RB Team

items.title: New Update | Advent of Bogomolova Limited-Time Event, New MK-Challenges & more
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, Murkoff’s latest update ushers in the Advent of Bogomolova , a new Limited-Time Event that marks the arrival of Sister Liliya and the awakening of a dangerous new presence within the Sinyala Facility. As she lurks within
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

Murkoff’s latest update ushers in the Advent of Bogomolova, a new Limited-Time Event that marks the arrival of Sister Liliya and the awakening of a dangerous new presence within the Sinyala Facility. As she lurks within select Trials, Reagents will face new variators, exclusive rewards, and fresh challenges designed to test obedience and resolve. This update also celebrates The Outlast Trials’ 2 year Anniversary, introduces new MK-Challenges and later, new Routine Therapies, restores the Join-in-Progress feature, and delivers a range of fixes and improvements.

This update includes

  • New Limited-Time Event: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

    [/*]

  • New Limited-Time Catalog: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: ELIMINATE THE LEGACY

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: FLATTEN THE FOREMAN

    [/*]

  • New Routine Therapies: DEADLOCK & BURNOUT

    [/*]

  • 2-Years Anniversary Tasks & Rewards

    [/*]

  • Return of the “Join Trials in Progress” feature

    [/*]

  • Various Bug Fixes and improvements

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

To welcome Liliya to the Sinyala facility, Murkoff has granted her audience with the other Prime Assets. For a limited time, Liliya will hide within the backdrop of selected Trials, waiting to pounce when you least expect it. God be with you, whether you want it or not.

Variators:

  • LILIYA BOGOMOLOVA - Liliya Bogomolova makes a special appearance in the Trial.

    [/*]

  • COLLECT THE AMULETS - Recover all the mannequin's amulets within the Trial. Fulfill the objective for additional rewards.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Catalog: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

  • A brand new Catalog is available for the duration of the Advent of Bogomolova Limited-Time Event.

    [/*]

  • Players can spend their acquired Event Tokens in the Catalog to unlock exclusive rewards.

    [/*]

  • Once the Advent of Bogomolova Event concludes on March 10, the Catalog will be removed and any unused Event Tokens will be forfeited. Be sure to spend your Tokens before March 10.

    [/*]

New MK-Challenge: ELIMINATE THE LEGACY

Children born to wealth are the inbred bastards of greed and corruption, cheating at even the games for idiot children, drooling at the teat of avarice. Match the symbols, eliminate the legacy, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: FLATTEN THE FOREMAN

Breach deeper into the factory where time brings new dangers. Opening emergency doors triggers lockdowns that enrage the Gooseberry, turning your escape into a tense race against time. Murkoff is teaching you sabotage and strategy, work smart, or suffer the consequences.

New Routine Therapies

Those new routine therapies will come after the time limited event.

  • DEADLOCK - SECURITY LOCKDOWN - The Trial is under full lockdown. You are issued two lockpicks to progress. Active surveillance cameras will administer shocks if detected.

    [/*]

  • BURNOUT - FIRE AND ICE PROTOCOL - Locate heat sources to maintain warmth - but extinguishing them is required to progress. Choose carefully.

    [/*]

In-Game Store Update

  • New FIRE HORSE Outfit available in the Blackmarket.

    [/*]

  • Event Catalog “DEEP BURN” is now available in the Catalogs Collection.

    [/*]

2-Years Anniversary Celebration

Join us as we celebrate 2 years since Murkoff officially welcomed all Reagents to start their therapy at the Sinyala Facility!

Receive exclusive rewards for The Outlast Trials' two years anniversary launch by completing a special set of tasks that are available to complete from February 10th to March 24th.

Join Trials in Progress

We are relaunching the Join-in-Progress feature, but now with more control.

  • Enable or Disable “Join-in-Progress” feature before launching any Trial (Group Leader only).

    [/*]

  • Decide whether or not you want to join trials in progress or groups in formation via the Group Finder Menu.

    [/*]

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • It is now possible to change the Trial difficulty, Invasion settings, and "Join in Progress" setting directly from the Trial Details menu. (as seen in above screenshot)

    [/*]

  • Fixed crash occurring with some AMD graphics card that have raytracing activated.

    [/*]

  • Therapies now have a minimum therapy level requirement:

    • Events: Therapy Level 5

      [/*]

    • Trial Maker: Therapy Level 10

      [/*]

    • Escalation: Therapy Level 15

      [/*]

    • Invasion: Therapy Level 30

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Trial Maker: Added new variators:

    • LELAND COYLE - Leland Coyle makes a special appearance in the Trial.

      [/*]

    • MOTHER GOOSEBERRY - Mother Gooseberry makes a special appearance in the Trial.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • In-Game Store: Reworked the purchase confirmation modal for better clarity on transaction.

    [/*]

  • Invasion: Fixed an issue where the Ping input while in camera wasn’t working correctly on some controller layouts.

    [/*]

  • Invasion: Ping icon will now be removed when pinged Reagent uses a hidespot.

    [/*]

  • Tasks mentioning “enemies” now support the Invasion Imposters. (Ex: Throw projectiles on enemies.)

    [/*]

  • You can now use the Quick Communication wheels in the shuttle.

    [/*]

  • Other various bug fixes and improvements.

    [/*]

If you encounter any issues in-game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a ticket to speak with our support team directly!

Catch you in the Sleep Room, Reagents!

- The RB Team

items.title: The Outlast Trials Launches Advent of Bogomolova
items.summary: The Outlast Trials has a new seasonal update available starting today, as the Advent of Bogomolova is underway with new content
items.content:
Posted in: Games , Indie Games , Video Games | Tagged: red barrels , The Outlast Trials

The Outlast Trials has a new seasonal update available starting today, as the Advent of Bogomolova is underway with new content

Indie game developer and publisher Red Barrels launched the latest seasonal update for The Outlast Trials , as Season 5.1 is underway. Known as the Advent of Bogomolova , the new limited-time event brings holy huntress Sister Liliya from the luxurious Resort to the Sinyala Facility. The "Recover the Amulet" variator will add new rewards for those who retrieve all of the mannequins' amulets within the Trial, along with other content to explore. We have the full details below for you to check out, along with the launch trailer.

The Advent of Bogomolva brings with it a new Limited-Time Catalog, available for the duration of the event. Players can spend their acquired Event Tokens in the Advent of Bogomolova Catalog to unlock exclusive cosmetics available until March 10. Once the Limited-Time Event ends, the Catalog will be removed and any unused Event Tokens will be forfeited. Be sure to spend your Tokens before March 10! As well, Season 5.1 will add two new MK-Challenges and two new Routine Therapies, the latter of which will debut after the conclusion of the Limited-Time Event.

Indoctrination is the sunlight that raises future generations. If you show the children how to learn, fostering a future of zealous factotums, we will let you out.

Breach deeper into the factory where time brings new dangers. Murkoff is teaching you sabotage and strategy: work smart, or suffer the consequences

In honour of The Outlast Trials celebrating the two-year anniversary of its initial launch, Murkoff is treating all reagents to several gifts: exclusive rewards that can be acquired by completing a special set of tasks, available from February 10th to March 24th.

Season 5.1 also includes the relaunch of the Join-In-Progress feature, which allows Reagents to enter Trials that have already commenced. Now Reagents have more control over the feature: party leaders can decide to enable or disable join-in-progress before launching any Trial, and all Regents join Trials in progress or groups in formation via the Group Finder.

items.title: Project Messiah Patch Notes | Season 5, New Prime Asset, New Environment & more
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, Sister Liliya, our newest Prime Asset, ushers in Project Messiah and welcomes you into the snowcapped opulence of The Resort , a new Trial environment where Reagents can "Despoil the Auction" , and prepare to face the di
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

Sister Liliya, our newest Prime Asset, ushers in Project Messiah and welcomes you into the snowcapped opulence of The Resort, a new Trial environment where Reagents can "Despoil the Auction", and prepare to face the divine, or face their reckoning! Murkoff is also instating a new exclusive Deluxe Catalog, the return of the Winter Kills Limited-Time Event, featuring a new Permafrost variator that will chill the blood of any Reagent. This update also includes 2 new MK-Challenges, an update to the Invasion Experimental Therapy and more.

This update includes

  • Season 5: Project Messiah

    [/*]

  • New Prime Asset: Liliya Bogomolova

    [/*]

  • New Environment: The Resort

    [/*]

  • New Trial: Despoil the Auction

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: Fabricate the Scandal

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: Seize the Narcotics

    [/*]

  • New Time-Limited Event: Winter Kills

    [/*]

  • New Time-Limited Catalog: Winter Kills

    [/*]

  • New Deluxe Catalog

    [/*]

  • New Deluxe Outfits in the Murkoff Store

    [/*]

  • Invasion Update

    [/*]

  • New Invasion Ranking System

    [/*]

  • Upcoming Event: Flashback Therapy

    [/*]

  • Twitch Drop Event

    [/*]

  • Other additions, improvements and fixes

    [/*]

Season 5: PROJECT MESSIAH

The Murkoff Corporation would like to introduce you to Liliya Bogomolova. A still current with a raging undertow, Liliya is on a mission from god to absolve you all of your sins... for a price.

Liliya Bogomolova silently stalks her "Cottage orné" turned cult compound in the newest Trial Environment, The Resort. Behind the closed doors of this lavish retreat, she prepares a VIP auction held only for her biggest spenders, but what is the price of a life? Find out how much in "Despoil the Auction".

New Prime Asset: LILIYA BOGOMOLOVA

The Murkoff Corporation is pleased to introduce Sister Liliya Bogomolova. Still waters hide a deadly rage. Liliya is woman of God, an ambush predator on a divine mission to cut away your sins. Absolution comes at a cost of treasure and flesh.

Liliya's Prime Asset traits:

  • Liliya hides in plain sight among her mannequins.

    [/*]

  • She can surprise attack Reagents with her long reach attack style.

    [/*]

  • Her brutal attacks immobilize the Reagent, who must fight for its life when it happens.

    [/*]

  • As a predator, she secretly relocates in the Trial and wait for its next prey to ambush.

    [/*]

New Trial: DESPOIL THE AUCTION

You are the negotiator. Humans are just one more product, amusement for those with money to burn. A fresh plaything is up for auction, it's up to you to ruin the lot.

New MK-Challenge: FABRICATE THE SCANDAL

You are the half-truth, the reality more honest than fact when the evidence fails the agenda. Crimes cannot be simply exposed, they must be shaped to entertain the swinish masses. Prove the crime and delight the swine.

New MK-Challenge: SEIZE THE NARCOTICS

You are the controlled substance. The law enslaves minds by caging bodies. You destroy bodies and liberate minds, making users more desperate for control. Find the narcotics and set yourself free.

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT MESSIAH

The new Deluxe Catalog “Project Messiah” is now available.

  • The catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items for your own self expression.

    [/*]

  • Unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins, earned by completing the Onboarding Catalog, other Deluxe Catalogs or purchasable in the Murkoff Store.

    [/*]

  • Acquire Stamps by completing Trials and Tasks, then use the Stamps to acquired Deluxe Catalog items.

    [/*]

  • As a reminder, the Deluxe Catalogs are available permanently. Unlock items at your own pace.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: WINTER KILLS

Winter Kills is an experiment in hostile, unstable environments rich in both punishment and rewards. With the addition of Permafrost, Murkoff will have hot cocoa on standby in the sleep room.

Program Winter Kills variators:

  • PERMAFROST. Permanent freezing temperature in the Trial. Locate heat sources to stay warm.

    [/*]

  • FROST MINES. Gas mines have been replaced with Frost Mines.

    [/*]

  • COLLECT THE GIFTS. Collect all the gifts in the Trial to earn extra rewards.

    [/*]

Event Schedule:

  • Part 1 will take place from December 9, 2025 @ 10am ET - December 23, 2025 @ 9:59am ET

    [/*]

  • Part 2 will take place from December 23, 2025 @ 10am ET - January 6, 2026 @9:59am ET

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Catalog: WINTER KILLS

A brand new Event Catalog is available for the duration of the Winter Kills Limited-Time event.

  • Players can spend their acquired Event Tokens in the Limited-Time Catalog to unlock exclusive cosmetics.

    [/*]

  • The Event Catalog access is free to all players for the duration of the event. All unspent Event Tokens will be lost after the event ends.

    [/*]

  • Once the Winter Kills 2025 event ends the Catalog will be vaulted. It will become available in the Murkoff Store at a later date. You will be able to unlock the Catalog with Murkoff Coins depending how far you progressed into it.

    [/*]

Murkoff Store refreshed with new items

New items have been delivered to the Murkoff Store:

  • Added 11 brand-new Deluxe Outfits to purchase with Murkoff Coins.

    [/*]

  • Event Catalog “Prime Time (2025)” is now available to purchase in the Catalogs Collection.

    [/*]

Invasion Experimental Therapy Update

Game mode improvements:

Invasion menu revamped with focus on QUICK PLAY and INVASION RANKS display. Quick Play is an alternance of playing as Reagent and Imposter as much as possible.

Imposter objective refined:

  • Imposters is now to “Hurt the Reagents”, and not necessarily eliminating them. Disruption is the core of the role.

    [/*]

  • As an Imposter, your current grade is now always visible in the HUD, updating dynamically as you perform actions during an invasion.

    [/*]

  • Imposters can now earn a high score even if Reagents complete the Trial.

    [/*]

  • Their performance is based on how effectively they disrupt and pressure Reagents, not on total elimination.

    [/*]

High Tier Trials (50+ Invasion matches): Reagents must now complete a random secondary objective before they can exit the Trial.

Anti-Stalling Measures: New rules prevent prolonged stalling in confined areas. Reagents who fail to progress within the allotted time will be terminated by electrocution.

Door Interaction Improvements: Doors have been reworked for more consistent reactions when slammed on pursuers.

Shuttle doors now automatically open when only one Reagent remains alive in the Trial.

Fixed an issue where Reagents did not receive the intended speed and stamina boost after successfully countering an Imposter.

Fixed an issue where Stamina regeneration would start during a kill animation instead of at the end.

Imposter balancing:

Knife attack miss stamina cost reduced to 10 (was 20).

Stab Hit stamina cost decreased to 25 (was 50).

Stab Kill stamina cost decreased to 25 (was 50).

Execution stamina cost decreased to 25 (was 50).

Stamina consumption when running has been reduced (can run for longer duration).

Base walk speed increased (to help stalking Reagents).

Walk speed while holding charged knife increased.

Imposters now have 2 lives (was 3). They have their initial life + one respawn (after killed).

Reworked ExPops aggros against Imposters (Imposters must be more careful now).

  • Dev comment: Overall, Imposter actions now consume less stamina, and their base speed has been adjusted to more closely match Reagents, ensuring they can effectively stalk their targets. However, Imposters are still expected to rely on stealth and treat their life as valuable. Staying alert to Ex-Pops in the Trial remains essential.

    [/*]

Reagents balancing:

Brick stamina damage reduced to 25 (was 50).

Stun stamina damage reduced to 25 (was 50).

Blind mine stamina damage reduced to 25 (was 100).

Blind mine reaction changed to Heavy long (was Severe).

Heal (with poison upgrade) stamina damage reduced to 25 (was 50).

Heal (with poison upgrade) reaction changed to Light (was Medium)

The changes have no impact on Ex-Pops.

  • Dev comment: Overall, Reagent attacks now drain less stamina from Imposters. We observed that the combined penalties (reaction slowdown, damage, and heavy stamina loss) made playing Imposter overly punishing against experienced Reagents. Additionally, the Heal Rig was never intended to be used offensively; its functionality has been refocused to serve as a support tool, rather than an aggressive option against Imposters.

    [/*]

Invasion Seasonal Rankings

  • A new ranking system has been introduced, offering unique rewards for participating in Invasion.

    [/*]

  • Your Invasion Rank increases as you complete matches, whether you play as a Reagent or an Imposter.

    [/*]

  • The grade you earn at the end of each Trial determines the amount of Rank Points awarded.

    [/*]

Upcoming Event: Flashback Therapy

Prepare to relive - or experience for the first time - the events of the past. Arriving early 2026.

  • Jaeger Onboarding

    [/*]

  • Under Surveillance

    [/*]

  • Deep Burn

    [/*]

  • Toxic Shock

    [/*]

  • Countdown

    [/*]

All the Catalogs of those past events are available to purchase in the Catalogs Collection.

Twitch Drop Event

Take part in our newest Twitch Drop running from December 9th 10am ET to January 6th 9:59am ET Link your account to Twitch and earn exclusive rewards by watching participating content creators.

  • The linking process is available directly from the Main Menu.

    • Find the Twitch Drop FAQs here.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Once your Twitch account is linked, start watching any The Outlast Trials streams to obtain exclusive cosmetic items which will be rewarded automatically once you reach the watch times.

    • Keep track of your progress in your Twitch Drops Inventory and make sure to click "CLAIM" on your items when you hit the required watch time. The next time you log into The Outlast Trials, your items will be in your inventory.

      [/*]
    [/*]

THE MURKOFF COLLECTIONS Comic Book - Chapter 7

If you have not already checked it out, read the latest Comic in the Murkoff Collections where we take a dive into Liliya's origins and learn how she had the unfortunate pleasure of ending up as Murkoff's very own Viper. Read this issue, as well as the other Murkoff Collections for free on our website.

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • New tasks to complete for each minigame available in the Sleep Room.

    [/*]

  • Added dozens of new trials in the Featured Trial Makers rotation.

    [/*]

  • Trial rewards based on grade have been increased.

    [/*]

  • Event tokens are now also given to Imposters after invasion matches.

    [/*]

  • Store: It is now possible to Equip a claimed item directly from the Store or Catalogs screens.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Imposter names would not be displayed correctly when in camera perspective.

    [/*]

Known Issues

  • Some tasks that mention doing something to "enemies" might not include other players in Invasion.

    [/*]

If you encounter any issues in-game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a ticket to speak with our support team. Also, if you played The Outlast Trials Season 4: Project Diarchy and would like to give us your feedback on it, feel free to fill out our survey here!

We will see you all in the Sleep Room very soon, Reagents!

- The RB Team

items.title: The next update for The Outlast Trials features a terrifying new enemy and map that might be the thing that scares me so much I can't play anymore
items.summary: At least we know it lives up to the horror tag.
items.content:
At least we know it lives up to the horror tag.

When you purchase through links on our site, we may earn an affiliate commission. Here’s how it works .

(Image credit: Red Barrels) Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter I've put myself through more hours in The Outlast Trials than I like to admit, and while I'm not Mother Gooseberry's biggest fan and I used to have nightmares about the Skinner Man, there hasn't been something that has really petrified me yet. A lot of the times I jumped were because I'd clumsily run around a corner too quickly and bumped into an enemy, or a friend had shouted something after being sat in silence for ten minutes.

However, the new update coming on Tuesday, December 9, not only adds a haunting new enemy, but an entirely new setting which already gives me the heebie-jeebies.

In a trailer uploaded to the Red Barrels YouTube channel , Project Messiah has been revealed. This update plans to take us away from the sterile halls of the Murkoff facility and into what looks like a desolate lodge. Except, unlike a lot of churches I've been into, this one is filled with masked mannequins, statues, and of course—dead bodies. This is The Outlast Trials after all.

But among all of the masked mannequins is Liliya Bogomolova, also referred to as Sister Liliya, who is adorned in an almost identical outfit to some of the mannequins. So, I imagine one of our main tasks in the trial will be narrowing down which one is her, and then avoiding her at all costs, as she doesn't exactly hold back once you have been spotted.

The trailer also emphasises being quiet and still, two things I'm notoriously not, especially when I'm nervous. So, if screeching down proximity chat could be my downfall in this new map, you best believe it will be. Especially if one of the statues I'm conveniently hiding behind springs to life and grabs ahold of me.

Oh, yep, that's a pregnant nun chasing you in the gameplay trailer for Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy The story trailer for Remothered: Red Nun's Legacy, an upcoming survival horror game, reveals more of the twisted location and odd inhabitants New Ill trailer sets a new bar for videogame ultraviolence, with at least three skull crushings This all falls into the game's newest trial: Despoil the Auction. The details of what exactly this entails puzzle-wise are yet to be revealed, and likely won't be until the update rolls out on December 9, but according to a description given on Steam : "You are the negotiator. Humans are just one more product, amusement for those with money to burn. A fresh plaything is up for auction, it's up to you to ruin the lot."

I'm sure whatever we've got coming will be as dark and twisted as we're used to in The Outlast Trials, and even though I'm already shaking in my boots, I'll no doubt put myself through the perils of completing the trial. How successful that will be, I don't know, but I'll be sure to report back if I make it out alive.

items.title: Project Messiah: Meet Liliya Bogomolova | Coming Dec. 9th
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, If God is love, then bloodshed is his only currency. Such is the testament of our newest Prime Asset, Liliya Bogomolova, the Praying Mantis who is otherwise known as Sister Liliya. A perfect picture of cryptic beauty, a
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

If God is love, then bloodshed is his only currency. Such is the testament of our newest Prime Asset, Liliya Bogomolova, the Praying Mantis who is otherwise known as Sister Liliya. A perfect picture of cryptic beauty, a vengeful angel sent from the Heavens themselves, Liliya is woman of God on a divine mission to cut away your sins. Adorned in an intricate mask that obscures her scarred visage, Sister Liliya offers salvation to those willing to pay the price in treasure and flesh. Reagents will soon have the opportunity to visit Liliya's hallowed cottage orné in The Resort, a gaudy alpine retreat and the newest Trial Environment. The Season 5: Project Messiah update will go live Tuesday, December 9th at 10am ET and it will also feature 2 new MK-Challenges, Winter Kills Limited-Time Event (with a twist), as well as improvements to the recently introduced Invasion Game Mode to which more details will be relayed in the Patch Notes the day of the update.

New Prime Asset: Liliya Bogomolova

Sister Liliya is a holy huntress; an ambush predator capable of surprise attacks with her long-reaching combat style. Within her cultish compound, she hides in plain sight amongst her mannequins, and her savage strikes can immobilize unsuspecting Reagents, forcing them into a fight for their lives. Behind the closed doors of the lavish Resort, she’s prepared a VIP auction held only for her biggest spenders… but what is the price of a life? 

New Trial: DESPOIL THE AUCTION

You are the negotiator. Humans are just one more product, amusement for those with money to burn. A fresh plaything is up for auction, it's up to you to ruin the lot.

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJET MESSIAH

The new Deluxe Catalog “Project Messiah” will be available. The catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items, unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins other Deluxe Catalogs or purchasable in the Murkoff Store.

New MURKOFF COLLECTIONS Comic Book - Chapter 7

Take a dive into Liliya's origins and learn how she had the unfortunate pleasure of ending up as Murkoff's very own Viper in our newest Murkoff Collections Comic Book. Read this issue, as well as the other Murkoff Collections for free on our website.

New MK-Challenge: FABRICATE THE SCANDAL

You are the half-truth, the reality more honest than fact when the evidence fails the agenda. Crimes cannot be simply exposed, they must be shaped to entertain the swinish masses. Prove the crime and delight the swine.

New MK-Challenge: SEIZE THE NARCOTICS

You are the controlled substance. The law enslaves minds by caging bodies. You destroy bodies and liberate minds, making users more desperate for control. Find the narcotics and set yourself free.

Winter Kills Limited-Time Event & More

Winter Kills is an experiment in hostile, unstable environments rich in both punishment and rewards. With the addition of Permafrost, Murkoff will have hot cocoa on standby in the Sleep Room (figuratively speaking). Winter Kills will take place from December 9, 2025 @ 10am ET - January 6, 2026 @9:59am ET.

Program Winter Kills variators:

  • PERMAFROST. Permanent freezing temperature in the Trial. Locate heat sources to stay warm.

    [/*]

  • FROST MINES. Gas mines have been replaced with Frost Mines.

    [/*]

  • COLLECT THE GIFTS. Collect all the gifts in the Trial to earn extra rewards.

    [/*]

Other notable additions

  • Invasion Game Mode Menu UI revamped to focus Quick Play and the new Invasion Seasonal Ranking System.

    [/*]

  • Quick Play is an alternance of playing as Reagent and Imposter as much as possible.

    [/*]

  • Pivoting Imposter objective to "Hurt the Reagents" instead of focusing on eliminating them.

    [/*]

  • Various Invasion game mode improvements and fixes. (more details to come in full Patch Notes at launch)

    [/*]

  • Imposter Rebalancing to allow "Imposter actions now consume less stamina, and their base speed has been adjusted to more closely match Reagents" (more details to come in full Patch Notes at launch)

    [/*]

  • Reagents Rebalancing to make "Reagent attacks drain less stamina from Imposters" to even the playing field pased on player data

    [/*]

  • More details on these points to come in full Patch Notes at launch

    [/*]

Twitch Drops Special Event

Check out our FAQ to learn how to link your game to Twitch and earn exclusive rewards by watching any content creators play The Outlast Trials on Twitch!

Gather your flock Reagents, and we will catch you in the Sleep Room very soon.

The RB Team
